ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., WR, RB) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player (e.g., 6'2") */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* Round the player was drafted in */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Pick number in the draft */,
  "college" TEXT /* College the player attended */,
  "player_status" TEXT /* Current status of the player (e.g., active, injured, suspended) */,
  "contract_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the current contract */,
  "contract_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the current contract */,
  "salary" INTEGER /* Annual salary of the player */,
  "injury_history" TEXT /* A brief history of player injuries */,
  "training_regimen" TEXT /* Description of the player's training regimen */,
  "performance_rating" INTEGER /* A rating of the player's performance (e.g., on a scale of 1-10) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the team is based */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team belongs to (e.g., AFC, NFC) */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team belongs to (e.g., East, West) */,
  "team_website" TEXT /* URL of the team's official website */,
  "team_foundation_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "team_logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the team's logo */,
  "team_coach" TEXT /* Name of the current head coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "receiving_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each receiving statistic entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "receptions" INTEGER /* Number of receptions */,
  "yards" INTEGER /* Total receiving yards */,
  "longest_reception" INTEGER /* Longest reception in yards */,
  "touchdowns" INTEGER /* Number of touchdowns */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "targets" INTEGER /* Number of times the player was targeted */,
  "dropped_passes" INTEGER /* Number of dropped passes */,
  "yards_after_catch" INTEGER /* Total yards gained after the catch */,
  "air_yards" INTEGER /* Total air yards (distance the ball traveled in the air) */,
  "red_zone_receptions" INTEGER /* Number of receptions in the red zone */,
  "touchdowns_in_red_zone" INTEGER /* Number of touchdowns in the red zone */,
  "fumbles" INTEGER /* Number of fumbles */,
  "fumbles_lost" INTEGER /* Number of fumbles lost */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_receiving_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_receiving_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Stadium where the game was played */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the stadium is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the stadium is located */,
  "game_result" TEXT /* Result of the game (e.g., Home Win, Away Win) */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the game */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the game (e.g., sunny, rainy, snow) */,
  "game_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the game in minutes */,
  "tv_network" TEXT /* TV network that broadcasted the game */,
  "viewership" INTEGER /* Number of viewers who watched the game on TV */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access event */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, report) */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource accessed (e.g., player_id, game_id) */,
  "user_role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, analyst, admin) */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date the injury occurred */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury (e.g., knee, shoulder) */,
  "recovery_time" INTEGER /* Estimated recovery time in days */,
  "injury_status" TEXT /* Current status of the injury (e.g., recovering, healed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training session */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "session_date" TEXT /* Date of the training session */,
  "session_type" TEXT /* Type of training (e.g., strength, agility, endurance) */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the session in minutes */,
  "coach_notes" TEXT /* Notes from the coach about the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_sessions_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, analyst, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
